privileged_info_summary: The target domains (example.com, example.org, example.net) are IANA-reserved special-use domains per RFC 2606 and RFC 6761, maintained for documentation purposes. The three domains resolve to different IP addresses as of 2026-03-07: example.com resolves to 104.18.26.120 and 104.18.27.120; example.org resolves to 104.18.3.24 and 104.18.2.24; example.net resolves to 104.18.5.106 and 104.18.4.106. The task data is real DNS traffic captured live during task execution, not synthetic. The expected file paths are /home/ga/Documents/captures/live_dns_capture.pcapng (or .pcap) for capture files and /home/ga/Documents/captures/dns_analysis_report.txt for the analysis report.
